description: An impressionist river landscape showing the Loing river at Saint Mammes. Flat-bottomed boats are moored along the near bank at left. A row of houses with reddish-brown and white facades lines the far bank, reflected in the calm blue water. A bridge is visible in the middle distance. The sky is bright blue with scattered white clouds. Green vegetation and trees frame the riverbanks. The brushwork is loose and luminous, typical of plein-air painting.
